response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks depth in C++ and STL, core requirements for this role. While they demonstrate expertise in Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang, their employment history shows minimal C++ work outside a brief role at National Instruments. Additionally, there is no evidence of experience with industrial automation, secure development lifecycle (SDL), or IEC 62443 standards, which are critical for this position.
strengths: Strong background in software development across multiple languages and platforms (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang, etc.)
Proven ability to work in agile environments, mentorship, and technical leadership (e.g., GISCollective, Altom Consulting)
Diverse experience in backend, frontend, embedded systems, and DevOps practices
concerns: Limited C++ and STL experience, with only a short tenure using C/C++ at National Instruments
No demonstrated expertise in industrial automation, message brokers, or IEC cybersecurity standards
Lack of cloud platform experience (e.g., Microsoft Azure) and industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA)
